previously_flagged_now_resolved: 02_hook — Lamarckism pre-empt added: narration now explicitly says 'No individual moth ever changed: light moths stayed light their whole lives, dark moths stayed dark' and 'The dark variant already existed by chance mutation before the soot arrived — natural selection just changed which variants survived.' Both my asks are in.

04_darwin_postulates — Postulate 2 tightened to 'Some variation is heritable (has a genetic component).' Phenotype-vs-genotype now stated explicitly with the bodybuilder one-liner: 'natural selection acts on phenotypes — the visible traits — not directly on genotypes. A bodybuilder's muscles don't make their kids stronger.' Slide footer reinforces it. Resolved.

05_fitness_definition — Relative-fitness explainer added: 'Relative means we compare to the highest performer in the same population — the top reproducer gets a fitness of one, everyone else is a fraction of that.' Context-dependence reinforced with the mouse-in-different-environment line. Resolved.

06_selection_types — Intersexual vs intrasexual now explicit: 'Intersexual selection is mate choice ... peacock tails evolved because peahens prefer them. Intrasexual selection is same-sex combat: deer antlers evolved from males fighting other males.' Narration also flags sexual selection as 'a separate framework,' and the slide hint specifies a divider so it doesn't read as a fourth bell curve. Resolved.

11_mechanisms — Selection rephrased as 'non-random with respect to fitness' and the phenotype layer made explicit: 'it favors phenotypes that reproduce more, and the alleles underlying those phenotypes ride along.' Non-random mating now correctly distinguishes assortative (phenotype similarity) from inbreeding (relatedness). Resolved.

12_drift_examples — Drift's non-adaptiveness now stated outright in both slide footer ('Drift is non-adaptive — the survivors were lucky, not better') and narration ('A great allele can be lost; a harmful one can become common'). 'Forever after' softened. Amish example upgraded to Ellis-van Creveld. Resolved.

13_evidence — Antibiotic Lamarckism pre-empt now in narration verbatim: 'the resistant bacteria didn't become resistant because of the antibiotic. The mutations were already there by chance in a tiny fraction of the population — the antibiotic just killed everyone else.' Resolved.

15_recap — 'Optional' dropped from the H-W assignment. 'Evolution has no goal and no direction toward complexity or perfection' bullet added. Phenotype-not-genotype and drift-non-adaptive also reinstated as recap reminders. Resolved.

16_path — Explicit success criteria checklist added: '(a) state Darwin's 4 postulates, (b) solve a H-W problem starting from the recessive phenotype, (c) name which of the five mechanisms a given scenario describes.' Resolved.
previously_flagged_still_open: 08_hw_conditions — The 'one round of random mating snaps genotypes to p², 2pq, q²' aside and the 'diploid, autosomal, two-allele' footnote were not added. Revisor explicitly held these as 'note' severity to avoid slide bloat. I flagged them as notes in round 1; I'm not going to upgrade that. Acceptable hold.

11_mechanisms — The 'two definitions of evolution' reconciliation (strict allele-frequency-change vs broad H-W-deviation) was not explicitly added, though the non-random-mating bullet now reads cleanly enough that the conflict is muted. Still a residual conceptual seam but no longer actively misleading. Acceptable.
overall_assessment: Clean pass. The revisor addressed 9 of my 11 flagged items, including all four 'minor' ones — every spot where an AP grader actually docks points (phenotype-not-genotype, pre-existing mutations / Lamarckism on both peppered moths and antibiotic resistance, drift non-adaptive, intersexual vs intrasexual, assortative vs inbreeding, no-progress-ladder) is now explicit in narration and reinforced in the recap. The two items still open are both 'note' severity that the revisor deliberately deferred to avoid slide bloat, and I agree with that call. The ap_traps_covered list grew from 5 to 11 traps and the new ones map exactly to my concerns. Ship it.
